title: Life-Death, Karma, True-False Wheel Formation
content:
The 
Life-Death, Karma, True-False Wheel Formation
 was the formation 
Wang Lin
 created by using his three essences of Life-Death, Karma and True-False. He created this formation soon after returning from the 
Ancient Celestial Realm
 and learning the secret of the ancient era.

Wang Lin created this formation by using the soul of tens of thousands of Outer Realm cultivators as each of the three essences required at least 50,000 souls to reach completion. He upgraded this formation into the 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
 to allow the 
Inner Realm
 to withstand the war for another three years while the 
Four Generals
 recovered.

Wang Lin used this formation to end the final battle at the 
Allheaven Star System
. He turned the formation three times and each turn killed over 100,000 Outer Realm cultivators. The last turn even killed the 
Black-robed Old Woman
 who ambushed Wang Lin inside the Sovereign's 
Fishing the Moon in the Well
. It also finished off the remaining Outer Realm cultivators.
{{
